name: Money Mind – AI Script Generator (NotebookLM)
description: Paste any book text, excerpt, or topic in the chat → get a complete Money Mind video script instantly. Uses OpenAI GPT with conversation memory.
usage: Open the public chat URL from n8n. Type a book title, paste an excerpt, or give a topic. The AI generates a complete video script in Money Mind format.
examples: Rich Dad Poor Dad – Chapter 1 on assets vs liabilities
Topic: emergency fund, make it a Quick Tip video
Book excerpt: [paste any text from a finance book]
Myth: you need to be rich to invest
